message:
✨ Add Claude swap suggestion service for proactive card swaps (#17)

Add a new claude package with a Service that analyzes cluster state
and suggests card swaps based on current issues:

- Analyzes pod issues, deployment issues, GPU nodes, and warning events
- Generates swap suggestions when issues are detected but no monitoring
  card exists for them
- Creates pending swaps with countdown timer for user to review

This enables the proactive "Claude suggests" feature where the dashboard
can automatically recommend relevant cards based on cluster state.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
